pi_items.source: Task description (line 3): 'Create a REST Export display with the path: `/api/v1/products`'
Task description (line 6): 'The API response must include these fields for at least 10 products'. Verified: seed_products.php creates 12 products, setup_task.sh ensures minimum of 10 exist.

Task description (lines 6-7): 'Product ID, Title, SKU (from the product variation), Price (from the product variation)'. Metadata field names match Drupal REST conventions for these entity properties.
Task description (line 4): 'The output format must be JSON'. Standard for REST APIs. Drupal REST module supports application/json format via Serialization module.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a REST API endpoint at /api/v1/products exposing products as JSON. The endpoint must return at least 10 products with fields: title, product_id, sku, and price. The environment is seeded with 12 real electronics products (Sony WH-1000XM5 at $348.00, Apple MacBook Air M2 at $1099.00, Samsung 65-inch TV at $997.99, Bose QuietComfort earbuds at $299.00, Logitech MX Master mouse at $99.99, Dell monitor at $619.99, Anker charger at $65.99, Keychron Q1 Pro keyboard at $199.00, WD Black SSD at $149.99, Razer DeathAdder mouse at $89.99, CalDigit dock at $399.99, Corsair DDR5 RAM at $94.99) from retail sources with verified pricing.
